Toggle navigation Puccinia sorghi (PUCCSO) Menu Overview → Photos Documents Overview Code created in: 2002-02-23 Basic information EPPO Code: PUCCSO Preferred name: Puccinia sorghi Authority: Schweinitz Other scientific names Name Authority Puccinia maydis Berenger Puccinia zeae Berenger Common names Name Language common rust of maize English rust of maize English Rost: Mais German rouille du maïs French roya del maíz Spanish maïsroest Dutch more photos... Taxonomy Kingdom Fungi      (
      1FUNGK      ) Phylum Basidiomycota      (
      1BASIP      ) Class Pucciniomycotina      (
      1TELIC      ) Subclass Pucciniomycetes      (
      1PUCCL      ) Order Pucciniales      (
      1UREDO      ) Family Pucciniaceae      (
      1PUCCF      ) Genus Puccinia      (
      1PUCCG      ) Species Puccinia sorghi      (
      PUCCSO      )

seed.symptoms: Small, circular to elongate, brick-red to brown pustules (uredia) on both leaf surfaces; severe infections cause leaf yellowing.
seed.causes: Fungus Puccinia sorghi; airborne urediniospores spread from southern overwintering sites; favored by cool, moist weather.
seed.treatment: Foliar fungicides (triazoles, strobilurins) most effective when applied early.
seed.prevention: Plant resistant hybrids; early planting to escape peak spore dispersal periods.
